name: Match any path
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /anything/here
identity:
  name: bob

name: Exact path
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/health
identity:
  name: bob

name: Method-scoped path + capture
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/myproj/repository/tree
identity:
  name: alice

name: Capture checked against trait
rule:
app_resources:
  - paths: ["/api/v4/projects/{project}/**"]
    methods: [GET]
    where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/alpha/issues
identity:
  name: alice
  traits:
    allowed_projects: [alpha, beta]

name: Glob in a non-final segment
rule:
app_resources:
  - paths: ["/api/v4/projects/*/{project}/**"]
    methods: [GET]
    where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/projects/anyteam/alpha/issues
identity:
  name: alice
  traits:
    allowed_projects: [alpha]

name: Capture equals identity
rule:
app_resources:
  - pred: |
      path.match(
        literal("api", literal("v4", literal("user",
          capture("username", greedy()))))) &&
      user.name == vars.username
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /api/v4/user/alice
identity:
  name: alice

name: Role required
input:
request:
  method: DELETE
  path: /admin/settings
identity:
  name: bob
  roles: [admin]

name: Additive list (two rules)
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /static/css/app.css
identity:
  name: bob

name: Method only (any path)
input:
request:
  method: POST
  path: /anything
identity:
  name: bob

name: Bare predicate, request fields
input:
request:
  method: GET
  path: /metrics
identity:
  name: bob

name: Denied: wrong method
input:
request:
  method: POST
  path: /api/users
identity:
  name: bob
